items.snippet: CION's co-CEOs declared a regular monthly cash distribution of $0.04413/share for February 2021, payable February 24, 2021.

items.headline_ai: CION declares January 2021 regular distribution and year-end 2020 special distribution

items.headline_ai: CION reports nine-month 2020 total return of -6.12%, paying $0.2712 per share in distributions
items.snippet: CION reported a -6.12% total investment return for the nine months ended September 30, 2020, having distributed $0.2712/share.

items.headline_ai: CION reports H1 2020 total return of -9.47%, distributing $0.1829 per share

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: CION recommences distributions, declares $0.04413 per share for August 2020
items.snippet: CION's board voted to resume distributions and declared a $0.04413/share monthly payout for August 2020, payable August 26, 2020.

8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: CION amends and consolidates credit facilities, fully repaying two lenders via JPMorgan revolver
items.snippet: CION amended its JPMorgan revolving credit facility to consolidate and repay all amounts under two other credit facilities and half of its UBS facility.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: CION Q1 2020 total return -11.25%, paid $0.1829 per share in distributions
items.snippet: CION reported an -11.25% total investment return for Q1 2020, having paid $0.1829/share in distributions during the quarter.

items.headline_ai: CION reports full-year 2019 total return of 5.55%, distributing $0.7456 per share
